creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Hi,

after not using it for a while I was trying to encode some material with handbrake but it crashes after the first pass.

However the log for the first pass is flooded with thousands of error messages like this:

x264 [error]: This build of x264 requires high depth input. Rebuild to support 8-bit input.

I'm running 10.1-RELEASE with the latest patches and handbrake is compiled from ports.

Any ideas?

% uname -a
FreeBSD thor.rostock.home 10.1-RELEASE-p10 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p10 #0: Wed May 13 06:54:13 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

% pkg info handbrake
